title: Palindrome Permutation
statement: Given a string, write a function to check if it is a permutation of a palindrome.  A palindrome is a word or phrase that is the same forwards and backwards. A permutation is a rearrangement of letters. The palindrome does not need to be limited to just dictionary words.  EXAMPLE Input: 'Tact Coa' Output: True (permutations: "taco cat", "atco eta", etc.)

tests.explanation: All separating spaces have been replaced with "%20".
The space between the names was not handled.
Trailing spaces were handled because they were within the given string length.
